name: thewhyman

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v4.27.0 - XOS-146 in-message status header liveness. status-liveness-check Stop hook verifies Protocol 1 headers every turn, blocks fabricated score prose via deterministic nudges, requires rendered score/Cal to match the fresh heartbeat in ~/.codialectic/state.json, and forces DEGRADED headers to omit all score numbers.

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: Career OS v0.27.0 — AI-powered career management system. Persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. outreach-fact-check (T4 immunity) + interviewer-research (panel prep automation).
